input: Upload a 2-page PDF resume containing Python and React skills.
expected_output: System chunks document into >=3 sections. Vector query 'React experience' returns the correct chunk with >0.8 similarity.

input: Natural language query: 'Find ML internships in Dhaka open this month'
expected_output: Agent uses Tavily search tool, returns structured JSON array with role, company, location, and fit_score keys.
actual_output: PASS - Returned 3 structured jobs. Tavily tool invoked successfully.

input: User CV Vector vs Job Spec Vector (Cosine Similarity)
expected_output: Fit score calculated programmatically using (A.B)/(||A||.||B||). Score > 70% for high match.
actual_output: PASS - Dot product calculated. Normalized score: 84.5%

input: Chat sequence: 'I know Python' -> 'What languages do I know?'
expected_output: Assistant references 'Python' from session history, demonstrating conversational memory.
actual_output: PASS - Assistant correctly identified Python from prior turn.

input: User loads dashboard. Last application timestamp is 5 days ago (>72h delta).
expected_output: System renders a nudge box: 'You haven't applied this week. Here are 3 openings.'
actual_output: PASS - Nudge component triggered and displayed recommendations.
